triage_profile.key_note: RF-13 is a META pass — analyzes escalation shape across all 46 hostile episodes using delta scoring and cycle detection. Primary source: 46 hostile episodes from triage + cross-RF foundation (RF-04: 93 flags; RF-05: 26 flags; RF-07: 12 flags). Direction imbalance (69% received) confirms Melissa as consistent escalator pre-analysis.

pending_cp3_items.description: Emotional numbing impact finding (ADD-004): Eli reports being numb to hostile exchanges. Present to GAL as normalization of sustained hostile exposure, not indifference. Reference arc synthesis note in ARC-RF13-001.

key_findings.primary_signal: 20 primary flags across 46 hostile episodes. Three arcs all ACTIVE and unresolved at dataset close. Melissa is the consistent escalator (69% received direction); Eli is the consistent de-escalator.
peak_episodes: EP-0854 Aug 4 2024 (311 msgs) — Sev-3, largest hostile episode in dataset
B-022 Jan-Feb 2025 cluster (365 hostile msgs in 32 days, 5 hostile episodes) — Sev-3
EP-1018 Feb 15 2025 (164 msgs) — in B-022 Sev-3 cluster
EP-1078 May 4 2025 (170 msgs) — AI-guided inflection point
key_findings.trajectory: Worsening Phase A (2022-2024) → extreme Phase A peak (Aug-Oct 2024) → brief unexplained silence → Phase B peak (Jan-May 2025) → structural shift Phase C (legal/visit-refusal). No attenuation at any phase boundary.
key_findings.role_consistency: Melissa = consistent escalator across all 46 hostile episodes. Eli = consistent de-escalator, increasingly strategic (AI-guided from May 2025). Role asymmetry is the defining characteristic of the escalation pattern.
key_findings.de_escalation_resistance: Confirmed across all phases. Strongest in Phase B/C: Eli adopted AI-guided communication specifically to reduce conflict; Melissa escalated regardless. EP-1078 (170-msg hostile episode over AI-guided responses) is the definitional evidence.
key_findings.temporal_pattern: Five holiday windows confirmed: Halloween, Thanksgiving/November, Christmas, Valentine's Day, New Year's. Multi-year recurrence documented. EP-0093 (Oct 31 2022) is the first hostile episode in the dataset — Halloween day.
key_findings.trigger_unpredictability: Eli cannot identify reliable triggers (CP2 Q1 — walking-on-eggshells dynamic). Escalation is internally driven, not reactive to Eli's communication choices.
key_findings.ai_guided_inflection: Eli implemented AI-guided communication strategy starting ~May 2025 (EP-1078). Melissa's hostile escalation continued unabated — confirms escalation is not a response to Eli's communication style.
key_findings.emotional_impact: Eli reports emotional numbing (CP2 Q6 — no memorable worst exchange). ADD-004 documents this as a normalization impact finding.
cycles_confirmed: CYC-001: Abby-content correlated escalation (Phase A/B peaks)
CYC-002: Logistics/scheduling spike cycles (scattered Phase A)
CYC-003: Holiday escalation cycle — 5 temporal windows, multi-year confirmed
CYC-004: Legal-threat ceiling cycle — RF-05 cross-confirmed
CYC-005: Child-welfare allegation deployment — RF-01/RF-04/RF-08 cross-confirmed

session_log.notes: RF-13 pass initialized. B-001 calibration batch processed (365 messages, Jan 11 2022 - Oct 2 2022). Zero primary flags — cooperative baseline. Hostile episode inventory (46 eps) embedded. Three arcs initialized CANDIDATE. Five anticipated cycles listed. CP2 review file generated with 6 questions. Halted per protocol.

arcs_updated: ARC-RF13-003 CANDIDATE→WATCHING (B-002); WATCHING→ACTIVE (B-005, EP-0219 within-episode resistance)
session_log.notes: CP2 calibration completed (Q1-Q6 answered). 5 addenda confirmed. Full pass completed B-002 through B-031 in single session. 20 primary flags: Sev-1 x7 (B-002,004,007,012,015,023,030), Sev-2 x11 (B-003,005,006,016,018,019,025,026,027,028,029), Sev-3 x2 (B-017 EP-0854 311 msgs; B-022 Jan-Feb 2025 cluster 365 msgs). All three arcs ACTIVE and unresolved at dataset close. Key CP2 findings: trigger unpredictability (walking-on-eggshells); AI-guided communication from May 2025 (EP-1078); Halloween + holiday temporal pattern confirmed; emotional numbing impact finding. 5 cycles confirmed including CYC-003 multi-year holiday pattern.
